title: VAL-26641 [UI/UX][CI] Build & Test Step
body:
FeatureOwner

MxJIRAissuekey,summary,issuetype,created,updated,duedate,assignee,reporter,priority,status,resolutionkey,summary,type,created,updated,due,assignee,reporter,priority,status,resolution67e031c3-c684-3aab-b7af-9bf49d41e788VAL-26641

 

Functional Questions:

QuestionAnswer

What should we display when cherry-pick is in progress/failed

currently we show an alert 

 

same as existing 

Current code shows handling for the loading of Build&Test

should we handle this?  

this case can happen

what to show when we're loading the Build&Test


find an illustration similar to cretae branch

color coding of config actions based on what staus? the environment status?

  

the color is for the status of the linting report not the state of the environment

MxEvolve – Figma

what it technical reseed name?    

the one existing we show it now as sub title

dumpIds is a list how should we show it?

see more or less (by default show 1)

seperated by comma under each other

is the Technical reseed section collapsed by default?

 

collapsed by default botht eh pane;l and the details

we have a behaviour if we click on the status we show more details, do we have a design for this?

 

we can show an info icon beside it 

it shows a tooltip on click

what banners should we show in the build&test for On-Demand Backport

  

show informative like this

this is being being backkoprted from the parent BP (soemnthing similar already exists)


is there an equivalent for this step in the new design?

  

to remove

who can do technical reseed?

  


Notes:

1.

Configuration Editor is behind a fetaure-toggle:

{"id":"workspace-configuration-editor-ui","toggledOn":true}

2. Can push (test execution) is also an API call

3. If cherry-picking is running/failed we need to  see how to show it

4.The last two buttons are for the last TPK that ran

We need to show at the end of the environment buttons, two new buttons one for repush the latest TPK Run and one to see the details of the last run

Probably these should be outside the existing environment actions component

The Repush Scenario button exists, but the Scenario Details does not

Environemt + TPK Buttons

5.Current Code gets Story IDs by fetching CI Process Execution from store. We might need to remove store altogether and take these either as input or refetch them (avoid refetching)


6. For the commits table, it is the same table under "Branch Details" tab, just show these Branch Details that currently exist are to be accessed form the tab. Only commits table is duplicated

Same one as existing in the branch details

7.in the automerge: open config editor does not show

it might be a flag form environment when to show/hide

8.

For the environment actions we need "Config Audit" button

  • It is a dropdown giving access to the HTML and CSV reports
  • Color coding and icons are added to this button
    • red for failures
    • green for passed
    • blue for still running

9.Show no results with illustration when no TPKs


10. If technical reseed, we need to show new section, between build and test

Commit ID is short form

TR name does not exist

Clicking on the TR status opens a dialog with more details (design be checked) 


Technical Reseed Dialog


11.

Merge button at the end in the middle 

When clicking on it we have an option to backport. By default backport yuor changes is no, and if user clicks yes we show run definition dropdown for backport

12. We need tio keep all existing pop ups

  • When repushing or running a new TPK --> confirmation pop-up to keep services up & previous runs will be cleaned
  • When a TPk is running, hovering over the TPK run button and the repush will show a tooltip explaining why the buttons are disabled, and users can't push another one
  • etc...

Check:

1. How to handle errors that might happen?
